meta.name: PRSM UPGRADE: FTNSBridge via UUPS
meta.description: Upgrades FTNSBridge proxy to a new implementation. Calls `upgradeTo(address)` on the proxy, gated by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) new implementation source-verified on Basescan, (2) auditor SAFE-TO-DEPLOY verdict, (3) diff vs. current implementation publicly disclosed, (4) 4-of-5 governance threshold (NOT operational), (5) timelock elapsed if applicable. THIS IS A GOVERNANCE TX, NOT OPERATIONAL.
